modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be distracting grammar usage and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Network closet UPS battery has failed and needs attention.

full_description_text:  
I noticed that the UPS in the network closet isn't working properly. The battery seems to have failed, which is a bit concerning since it’s supposed to provide backup power. This could lead to issues if there's a power outage, so I wanted to get this looked at as soon as possible.
short_description: Network closet UPS battery has failed and needs attention.
description: I noticed that the UPS in the network closet isn't working properly. The battery seems to have failed, which is a bit concerning since it’s supposed to provide backup power. This could lead to issues if there's a power outage, so I wanted to get this looked at as soon as possible.
